target: July 22nd
1. Call the Window
(First, I should call the Window)

(To understand what's happened so far,
I need to show her the memory of Ushio…)

Hey, Shinpei! What's wrong?
You said you'd call later, but you're quick.
Ah, sorry.

No, it's fine.
I also wanted to talk early.

Hey, Shinpei.
Actually… about Ushio…
It's about the Kiyokawa Line.

…What!?
How did you know!?

Including that… I need to ask something.
I want to borrow your power.

Come to the gym at Hitogashima Junior High
soon. I'll explain everything there.

Whaaat!?
What's going on!?
Sudden school visit…

I'm begging you, Sou!
It's important!
…Okay, I'll go.
R-really?

It's about you, isn't it?
There's something you can't say over the phone.
I'll find out when I get there.
Thank you…

Also, is Tokiko nearby?
I need you to switch.
Tokiko?
Yeah, I need Tokiko to come to the school too.
Right, wait a second.

Hey Tokiko!
Shinpei says he needs to talk!
(At this point, Tokiko is helping Heine)

(But if she sees my memory from the Hiruko Cave,
she'll know I was betrayed by Heine
and join us)

(Even if I don't know Heine's true goal,
I might learn about the enemy's inside info)
…Shin-chan.
Hm?

Give me the phone.
I'll talk to Tokiko.
No, can't do that.
Why not?

Tokiko doesn't know anything yet.
Until she shares memories,
I want to keep information to a minimum.

She might have things to say,
but hold on for now.
Sorry, Tokiko's not here.

Weird…
I thought she was in her room after taking a bath.

If that's the case,
tell her from you.

Yeah, sure.
I'll tell her later.

If I can't talk to her directly,
have her get a message to come to the school.

Leave it to me.
See you later!

…Alright!
Sou and Tokiko are on board!
Who's next?

Also call Totsumura.
He helped at the Hiruko Cave,
and he's a cop after all.

If you're calling him,
I should scan his gun later.

Where's Totsumura now?
I hope he's at the station…
Hey, this is the Hero of Justice!

Good! 
Totsumura, you're there.

That voice… Shinpei?
What's wrong?
Actually… something big is going to happen at the school!

At the school?
What's so big about it!?

Please!
I'll be waiting at the gym,
please come!

Hey, be specific!
I don't get it at all!
How can I act on a weird call like this?
(Well, that's to be expected…)
(But I can't back down either)

I need your help somehow!
It's absolutely necessary!
That's why I said to explain properly---
One thing I can say for sure!
What?
A woman with a G-cup will come too!
Understood! Gymnasium!

Great…
Everyone should be here.

Totsumura, you're still the same~
Hey Mio?

Mio, get it together.
Where's your usual energy?
(I see… she still can't accept the fake loop story)

(Ushio's existence,
Tokiko hiding things…)

(Plus she's died several times herself…
It's unreasonable to expect her to accept it fast)
Ushio, give Mio some time---
Listen, Mio.

Tokiko will be fine.
If I show her my memories,
she'll definitely wake up!
But…

I don't care about anything!
Whatever it is,
we can just redo it all from now!
Got it?
Y-yes…
Hey… older sister?
Huh? What?

Older… sister…
Older sister!!!
Waaaahhh!!!

Whaaat!?
Why are you suddenly crying so much!?

My older sister!
I-I-I'm hereee!!!

Ugh… I'm so sad…
I'm sorry!
I called her a monster…

My older sister…
my older sister…
She's the real me's older sister!!!
You're crying too much.
Hic… hic… I'll fight too!

Huh, fight… I was only bringing you along
for your safety---
I don't want to be protected all the time!!!
Mio…
Shinpei, it's okay, right?

(She's never fought the Shadow before,
and she has limited weapons…)
(…But she won't listen anyway)

Then, let's get ready.
We need to leave soon.
Yes!

Alright!
We'll all do it…?
Aaaaah!!!
W-what!?

W-what! What's going on!?
Something happened!

Curry!!!
I can't eat it today!?

What, curry?
You scared me.

No time to cook,
I'll make curry sandwiches instead.
<color=#GF_TIPS_085>Curry sandwich</color>…
Thanks a lot!!!

I need to make some for everyone,
including Alan.

Oh right!
Dad will worry,
so I should leave a note.

Curry!
Curry, curry!

Here it comes!
My older sister's "Curry Rhythm"!

Curry, curry!
Curry~!!!
Sand! Sand!
You two sisters are…

(It doesn't feel like we're about to fight
with our lives at all)
(But maybe that's exactly why…)

(If we eat some good food,
it'll restore our energy)

(Great!
I'll make some delicious curry sandwiches!)
